Title: Django deprecation warnings on Python 3.14
Description: Pytest unit execution emits DeprecationWarning for asyncio.iscoroutinefunction from django.contrib.auth.decorators under Python 3.14
Resolution: Added targeted pytest filterwarnings entry for Django auth decorator deprecation pattern while tracking upstream framework compatibility

Title: DRF route name collision with catalog views
Description: Unnamespaced DRF router names shadowed catalog HTML route names and broke get_absolute_url expectations
Resolution: Namespaced catalog.api URL include and declared app_name in catalog.api.urls

Title: Django context copy crash in test client
Description: Template render instrumentation failed with AttributeError in Django context copy on Python 3.14
Resolution: Added pytest Python 3.14 compatibility shim for store_rendered_templates with safe context snapshot fallback

Title: Manifest staticfiles lookup failure in tests
Description: WhiteNoise manifest backend raised missing css/styles.css entry during template rendering tests
Resolution: Configured test-time staticfiles backend to StaticFilesStorage via autouse pytest fixture

Title: Static root directory warning in test middleware
Description: Pytest output emitted UserWarning from WhiteNoise middleware when STATIC_ROOT directory was missing
Resolution: Created STATIC_ROOT automatically in conftest autouse fixture during tests

Title: UnorderedObjectListWarning for Genre and Language list views
Description: Django emits UnorderedObjectListWarning when paginating Genre and Language querysets because their models lack a default ordering
Resolution: Implemented deterministic ordering in GenreListView.get_queryset and LanguageListView.get_queryset using .order_by("name") and removed the temporary warning suppression from pytest.ini

Title: Missing Selenium dependency for E2E UI suite
Description: Phase-7 browser E2E UI tests could not import Selenium modules because requirements-dev.txt did not include selenium
Resolution: Added selenium==4.25.0 to requirements-dev.txt and installed dependencies before executing the E2E UI suite

Title: Pytest unhandled thread warning during live server teardown
Description: Pytest emitted PytestUnhandledThreadExceptionWarning when Django ThreadedWSGIServer closed SQLite connections from a non owner thread on Python 3.14
Resolution: Added Python 3.14 pytest shim in conftest.py to wrap ThreadedWSGIServer _close_connections and ignore only the known cross thread SQLite close DatabaseError message

Title: Legacy marker expression in Phase 8 checklist command
Description: Phase-8 checklist used pytest marker expression not system while system browser journeys are tagged e2e_ui causing browser tests to be skipped instead of deselected in consolidated runs
Resolution: Validated both marker expressions produce equivalent coverage and standardized documentation to use not e2e_ui for non-browser consolidated coverage runs
